steps.title: Recognize what the passage focuses on
steps.content: Every sentence after the underlined definition discusses convergent evolution or its variations—shared genetic mechanisms, different genetic mechanisms, and finally a comparative study of both. Convergent evolution is clearly the organizing concept throughout.

steps.title: Match the definition's role
steps.content:
Choice B says the definition gives a basic description of a phenomenon that is central to the discussion that follows.

The underlined portion does exactly that—it explains what convergent evolution is in clear, accessible terms before the passage examines how different research teams investigated it through different genetic mechanisms.

A, C, and D mischaracterize it as providing research examples, clarifying something unclear in the studies themselves, or introducing a method.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
